# Template check catches field errors when a closure is passed as a function
# argument to another package and the concrete type flows through indirectly.

! check-templates ./...
stderr 'base\.html:2:5: executing "base\.html" at <\.Missing>: Missing not found on example\.com/app/handlers\.Page \(E001\)'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"html/template"
	"net/http"

	"example.com/app/handlers"
)

func main() {
	t := template.Must(template.ParseFiles("templates/base.html"))

	render := func(w http.ResponseWriter, data any) {
		_ = t.ExecuteTemplate(w, "base.html", data)
	}

	http.HandleFunc("/", handlers.HandleIndex(render))
}
-- handlers/handler.go --
package handlers

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

type Page struct {
	Title string
}

func HandleIndex(render func(http.ResponseWriter, any)) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		render(w, Page{Title: "Home"})
	}
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint
-- templates/base.html --
<h1>{{.Title}}</h1>
<p>{{.Missing}}</p>
